NAME: FANTOM — 20th year: transcriptomic atlases & ncRNA annotation
DESCRIPTION: FANTOM enters its 20th year with expanded transcriptomic atlases including FANTOM6 functional annotation of non-coding RNAs. The resource now covers CAGE-based expression for over 2,000 samples and provides extensive functional data on lncRNAs through systematic perturbation screens.
TITLE: FANTOM enters 20th year: expansion of transcriptomic atlases and functional annotation of non-coding RNAs
